title: Planting Knowledge, Harvesting Success
subtitle: (Skill Development - Java, Interview, Spoken English, Abacus, etc.)
description: At Last Try Academy, our motto “Planting Knowledge, Harvesting Success” shows how education is like the growth of a plant...

title: Root Group (1st – 4th Standard)
subtitle: (Strong Foundation - Basics & Values)
description: The Root group represents the starting stage of education, just like roots are the base of a plant...

title: Stem Group (5th – 8th Standard)
subtitle: (Growth & Curiosity)
description: The Stem group symbolizes growth and support, just like the stem carries water and nutrients...

title: Leaf Group (9th – 12th Standard)
subtitle: (Board Exams & Mastery)
description: The Leaf group represents productivity, just like leaves prepare food for the whole plant...

title: Flower Group (Entrance Exams – JEE, NEET, etc.)
subtitle: (Specialization & Talent)
description: The Flower group represents blooming and identity, just like flowers show the beauty of a plant...

title: Fruit Group (Government Exams – State, Central)
subtitle: (Reward & Success)
description: The Fruit group represents achievement and reward, just like fruits are the result of a plant’s growth...

title: Seed Group (Skill Development – Java, Interview, Spoken English, Abacus, etc.)
subtitle: (Career Skills)
description: The Seed group represents new beginnings and spreading growth, just like seeds start new life...
